title: Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Assam

overview.short: Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary () is a wildlife sanctuary on the southern bank of the Brahmaputra in Morigaon district in Assam, India.
overview.description: Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary () is a wildlife sanctuary on the southern bank of the Brahmaputra in Morigaon district in Assam, India. It was declared in 1987 and covers 38.85 km2 (15.00 sq mi), providing grassland and wetland habitat for the Indian rhinoceros. It holds one of the largest Indian rhinoceros population in Assam.

topPlaces.name: Mayong, Assam
topPlaces.description: Mayong (or Mayang) is a village in Morigaon district, Assam, India. It lies on the bank of the river Brahmaputra, approximately 40 km (25 mi) from the city of Guwahati.

topPlaces.name: Saukuchi
topPlaces.description: Saukuchi is a locality in southern part of Guwahati surrounded by Lokhra and Ghoramara localities. This locality serves as secondary route which connects Beltola with Lokhra area, the other being National Highway 37.

items.note: Mayong (or Mayang) is a village in Morigaon district, Assam, India. It lies on the bank of the river Brahmaputra, approximately 40 km (25 mi) from the city of Guwahati.

Saukuchi is a locality in southern part of Guwahati surrounded by Lokhra and Ghoramara localities. This locality serves as secondary route which connects Beltola with Lokhra area, the other being National Highway 37.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (29 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pobitora Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mayong, Assam, Saukuchi.
